case_title: IAIN A. MACDONALD VS. ANTIGUA RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA ANTIGUA MEXICAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,024.11 FILED BY MACDONALD, IAIN A. AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIGUA RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA ANTIGUA MEXICAN GRILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED FEB-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIGUA RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA ANTIGUA MEXICAN GRILL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ONLY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, IAIN A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTIGUA RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC DBA ANTIGUA MEXICAN GRILL $2,024.11 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,131.61, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
